title: Parasuramesvara Temple
tagline: Parasuramesvara Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: The Gudimallam Lingam is an ancient linga in the Parashurameshwara Swami Temple of Gudimallam, a small village near Tirupati city in the Yerpedu mandal of the Tirupati district of
overview.description: The Gudimallam Lingam is an ancient linga in the Parashurameshwara Swami Temple of Gudimallam, a small village near Tirupati city in the Yerpedu mandal of the Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is situated about 24 kilometres (15 mi) south-east of Tirupati city. Though Gudimallam is a small village, it is well known because it has a very early linga that is unmistakably phallic in shape, with a full-length standing relief figure of Shiva carved on the front. This is in the garbhagriha of the Parasurameswara Temple, Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Gudimallam
topPlaces.description: Gudimallam is a village near Tirupati, located in Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh state of India. It is situated about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) southeast of Tirupati city.

topPlaces.name: Chennam Palli
topPlaces.description: ChennamPalli (also spelled Chennam Palle or Chennampalli) is a village in Yerpedu mandal of Tirupati district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The village is located near Renigunta and Tirupati in the Rayalaseema region.

topPlaces.name: Madibaka
topPlaces.description: Madibaka (Telugu:మడిబాక) is a village in Yerpedu mandal, Tirupati district, Andhra Pradesh. It is 26 km from the temple town of Tirupati and 19 km from Sri Kalahasti.

topPlaces.name: Anjimedu
topPlaces.description: Anjimedu is a village panchayat in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh, Tirupati district, and is located between the temple towns of Tirupati and Sri kalahasti. It is 21 km from Tirupati and 16 km from Sri kalahasti.

topPlaces.name: Vadamalapeta
topPlaces.description: Vadamalapeta is a village and headquarters of Vadamalapeta mandal in Tirupati district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located on the outskirts of the famous Tirupati city.

topPlaces.name: Renigunta mandal
topPlaces.description: Renigunta mandal is one of the 36 mandals in Tirupati district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. Its headquarters are located at Renigunta, suburb of Tirupati..

topPlaces.name: Kavali mandal
topPlaces.description: Kavali mandal is one of the 38 mandals in Nellore district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. Its headquarters are located at Kavali.

topPlaces.name: Renigunta
topPlaces.description: Renigunta is a suburb and outgrowth of Tirupati located in Tirupati district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is a part of Tirupati urban agglomeration.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Parasuramesvara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Parasuramesvara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Parasuramesvara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Parasuramesvara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Parasuramesvara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Parasuramesvara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Parasuramesvara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Parasuramesvara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gudimallam, Chennam Palli, Madibaka, Anjimedu, Vadamalapeta.
